headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Waste Management, Raises Price Target to $270
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Waste Management (NYSE:WM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $265 to $270.

headline: What to Expect From Waste Management's Q1 2026 Earnings Report

headline: Is Waste Management (WM) Fairly Priced After Recent Steady Share Performance?
summary: If you are wondering whether Waste Management's current share price fairly reflects its quality and prospects, this article walks through how the numbers stack up on value. The stock last closed at US$233.10, with returns of 6.7% year to date and 4.5% over the past year, after more modest moves of a 1% decline over both the last 7 and 30 days.
